---
description: "Quick session orientation: load current baselines, identify biggest bottleneck, surface next ready hypothesis."
agent: "main-orchestrator"
---

Start a focused research session:

1. Read `.github/knowledge/kb-baselines.md` — confirm today's baseline numbers
2. Read `.github/knowledge/kb-research-queue.md` — find the top READY hypothesis
3. Read `.github/knowledge/kb-what-failed.md` — check nothing is being retried
4. Summarize in one paragraph: current state, biggest bottleneck, recommended next action

Do not run any code. This is a read-only orientation.
